name: BYU Sandbox
mission: Studio-style program where BYU students build venture-scale companies during the school year.
signature_edge: BYU's flagship student-founder studio — alumni include Owlet, Mavely, and several Y Combinator companies. Among the highest-output university accelerators in the western US.

name: BYU Crocker Innovation Fellowship
mission: Year-long fellowship pairing top BYU students with industry mentors to ship a real product.
signature_edge: Small cohort, hand-picked — Crocker Fellows ship a working product before they graduate, which is why their warm-intro graph is unusually tight.

name: BYU Rollins Center for Entrepreneurship & Technology
mission: BYU's hub for entrepreneurial education — courses, competitions, and startup mentorship.
signature_edge: Origin point for most BYU-trained operators currently working in Utah deep tech — long pre-dates Sandbox and feeds into it.

name: U of U Lassonde Entrepreneur Institute
mission: U of U's cross-campus entrepreneurship program with the on-campus Lassonde Studios housing student founders.
signature_edge: Houses 400+ student founders in a live-in studio — among the largest residential entrepreneurship programs in the US.

name: U of U Center for Medical Innovation
mission: Medical-device innovation pipeline — turns clinician problems into spinout-ready prototypes.
signature_edge: Pairs U of U clinicians with engineering teams to identify FDA-track device opportunities — the institutional ramp into Utah medtech.

name: U of U PIVOT Center
mission: U of U's tech-transfer + corporate-partnership office (formerly Tech & Venture Commercialization).
signature_edge: Single largest pipeline of Utah bioscience and energy spinouts — every U of U research-driven startup goes through here.

name: USU Innovation Campus
mission: Logan-based research-park anchoring USU's industry partnerships in defense, agriculture, and energy.
signature_edge: The northern-Utah counterweight to Lehi/Provo/SLC — defense + ag-tech founders cluster here, mostly invisible from the Wasatch Front.

name: USU Space Dynamics Lab
mission: USU-affiliated DoD research lab — sensors, satellites, and aerospace systems for the US government.
signature_edge: The single largest concentration of cleared aerospace and DoD-funded engineers in Utah — outside Lehi/Provo/SLC entirely.

name: MAGICC Lab (BYU)
mission: Multiple AGent Intelligent Coordination & Control — multi-vehicle robotics and UAV autonomy research.
signature_edge: Most BYU-trained autonomy and drone engineers in Utah trace their lineage here — reliable warm-intro path for any defense-AI startup.

name: FLOW Lab (BYU)
mission: Aerodynamic shape optimization for wind energy, drones, and aircraft — Andrew Ning's research group.
signature_edge: Utah's deepest expertise in aerodynamic optimization — relevant for any clean-energy or aerospace founder building physical hardware.

name: Howell Compliant Mechanisms Lab (BYU)
mission: Compliant-mechanism and origami-inspired engineering — deployable structures for space and defense.
signature_edge: World-leading lab in compliant mechanisms — patents licensed by NASA and Johns Hopkins. The bonded community of Utah hardware founders working in this niche.

name: BYU Neuroscience Center
mission: Cross-disciplinary neuroscience program — bridges mechanical engineering, biology, and clinical care.
signature_edge: Rare cross-disciplinary node — the only Utah lab where mech-eng PhDs work directly on motor-control and rehabilitation problems.

name: Silicon Slopes
mission: Statewide tech-community organization — events, talent, and policy advocacy for Utah tech.
signature_edge: The cross-cutting connector — every Utah operator and founder eventually shows up here. If two profiles share Silicon Slopes, the warm-intro graph is one degree.

name: Kickstart Seed Fund
mission: Mountain-West seed VC backing technical founders, with a heavy Utah concentration.
signature_edge: Utah's most active seed fund — portfolio overlap is a strong warm-intro signal because partners actively connect founders.

name: Pelion Ventures
mission: Long-running Utah-based venture firm investing in early-growth software and tech companies.
signature_edge: Among the longest-running tech VCs in the Mountain West — portfolio overlap implies a multi-decade relationship lattice.
